mapper.select:
SELECT p.*, c.name AS courseName, GROUP_CONCAT( per.name ) AS personNames FROM lab_project p LEFT JOIN lab_course c ON p.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN lab_person per ON FIND_IN_SET( per.id, p.person_ids ) > 0 where p.is_deleted = 0
and p.course_id = #{courseId}
and p.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{name},'%')
GROUP BY p.id, p.name ORDER BY p.update_time desc
